description:
About this item
SPACE SAVING DESIGN: With the dimension of 13.4’’ W X 13.4’’ D X 75’’ H, this corner bookshelf makes full use of any limited small spaces or corner spaces, turning unused spaces into storage. Maximize the storage space of small space without taking up too much spaces. This storage shelf fits anywhere easily, like living room, kitchen, bathroom, and stuff.
6-TIER STORAGE RACK WITH FENCES: Featuring with 6-tier structure, this corner book shelf provides plenty of storage space for your books, displays, photo frames, vase, potted plants, and etc. The back baffle and fences beside designed to prevent items from slipping off. The top shelf also offers extra storage.
MULTIPURPOSE CORNER SHELVES: Take advantage of every small or corner space of your room with this bookcase. Not only as a perfect corner storage shelves, this narrow tall shelf also works well as a etagere bookcase, display shelf, plant stand, kitchen storage rack, or household items storage. Perfect for small spaces
SOLID & RELIABLE CONSTRUCTION: Crafted from thick solid E1 particleboard and sturdy metal frame, this narrow shelf tower is built to last, sturdy, water and scratch resistant. Adjustable leg pads added to help the standing shelf stand stably on uneven floor. Anti-tipping strap kits help prevent the skinny tall shelf from falling down.
